title: Battle Axe grants +2 Atk while equipped

plan.title: Battle Axe grants +2 Atk while equipped
plan.summary: Attach Battle Axe and verify the attack modifier route is represented for the equipped creature.

notes: Pre-place this equip Magic on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
Use the card rules text for expected stat changes.

steps: Put Battle Axe in player_1 magic slot.
Attach it to player_1 primary creature.
Verify the while-equipped effect is represented by runtime state/events.

expectedAssertions.label: Battle Axe stat route emitted evidence

manualVerification: Verify against card text: Atk: +2. Hit: +2.
riskNotes: Battle Axe is parsed as APPLY_DICE_MODIFIER, which may need runner/runtime parity with other equip stat modifiers.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_057_battle_axe-057-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
